tweet.text:
Oh baby, we've got big things going on at @FanDuel Faceoff for Gronk’s Games Week!!!
Earn free games bonuses all week just by playing and make sure to check out Gronk Spike Cornhole to get your practice in ahead of hitting the tailgates
https://t.co/CkD9H0W0ky https://t.co/353gdJhBBv
These @WolfAndShepherd shoes are the shhhiiiiii…. @MattLeinartQB @ErinAndrews https://t.co/thMVUbxa9g

🚨GIVEAWAY TIME🚨
Enter for your chance to win a $10,000 package to play at the @PokerStars North American Poker Tour this November!
All you have to do is: Follow @FanDuelCasino Reply with your favorite NFL Touchdown scorer for this Sunday’s games
I’ve got a few of my… https://t.co/zkhgeqlDMv https://t.co/q4qrQfyfd2
Sending love to everyone affected by this hurricane, and especially the Tampa Bay area, I’m coming soon to help clean up https://t.co/FccYJlQrYK
We love you Florida, we love you Tampa Bay! Please help in anyway you can! Let’s rebuild Florida one step at a time! Help out here: https://t.co/9aIKDWDBUo https://t.co/XciYF15neu
